_metadata.description: Normative four-year course pathways extracted from Eastern in 4 advising worksheets. See extract_pathways.py for full assumptions.
policy_assumptions: LAC 100 and LAC 101 are co-enrolled Year 1 Fall (not catalog-enforced).
LAC 200 is pinned to Year 2 Fall (catalog only requires LAC 100).
LAC 400 requires 90+ credits per Spring 2026 Senate resolution (catalog: 60).
ENG 100/P and LACM foundational math are Year 1 Fall, within first 30 credits.
Banner major code mapping is hardcoded — verify against live Banner data.
Right-side semester grid parsed and applied as second-pass enrichment; 47 of 81 programs have grid data (edu duals, Nursing, Social Work, PE).
Carry-forward within sections is a last-resort fallback only; any carry_forward slots should be investigated.
